trans-unit.source: Genius Baller was born 2017 founded by coach and player of Basketball Katabarwa Murenzi Gilbert(known as coach GB). With his ambition and passion of coaching and playing basketball and his love of children. He started Genius Baller to offer Basket ball skills to children, entertaining,,confidence Self esteem, improve their fitness level,team work encouragement,development of their social skills and general health improvement.At Genius Baller we provide an opportunity for the kids to practice and improve foreign language where the language of teaching and instruction is English. We help kids with an ambition to become profession basketball player to achieve their dreams with the Love of basketball. We have resources to provide recreational benefits which other sports programs are unable to match.
trans-unit.target: Genius Baller于2017年出生，由篮球运动员Katabarwa Murenzi Gilbert（被称为GB教练）创立。 以他对教练和打篮球的野心和热情以及对孩子的热爱。 他创办了Genius Baller，向孩子们提供篮球技巧，寓教于乐， 自尊，提高他们的健身水平，鼓励团队合作，发展他们的社交技能 和全面改善健康状况。在Genius Baller，我们为孩子们提供了练习的机会 并改善教学语言为英语的外语。 我们帮助有抱负的孩子成为职业篮球运动员，实现他们的梦想 对篮球的热爱。 我们拥有提供其他体育项目无法比拟的娱乐福利的资源。
trans-unit.note: An introduction for genius baller activities

trans-unit.source: Genius Baller Offer The Following Basketball Programs: Weekly Basketball Training Programs 1 on 1 Private Basketball Lessons Beginners Basketball Winter Camp Summer Camp
trans-unit.target: Genius Baller 提供以下篮球计划: 每周篮球训练计划 一对一私人篮球课 初学者篮球 冬令营 夏令营

trans-unit.source: Effective Genius Baller’s basketball coach with 7 years of experience, skilled in communication and goal-setting. Seeking to raise a youth basketball spirit, better practice drill plans, and improved use of man-to-man and zone plays. Ensured individual team members set and hit personal goals for athletics and academics with 90 % success rate. he has been coaching children and youths with different levels of basketball skills for more than 7 years at univeristy of kentucky(USA), INTERNATIONAL CLUB(Beijing ,china), YOUCAN Youth,NIKE BASKETBALL SUMMER CAMP at(Hunan,Changsha,Shenzhen,Yunnan,Shandong,Hangzhou), CHENGSI-CULTURE(Shanghai), SHANGHAI BLACK WIND company,YK PAO SCHOOL,菊园小学, 一中心小学， 育才初级中学 and LIQIUPING company(Shanghai)
trans-unit.target: 有效的Genius Baller的篮球教练，具有7年的经验，善于沟通和设定目标。 寻求提高青年篮球精神，更好地练习训练计划，并改善人对人和区域比赛的使用方式。 确保个人团队成员为体育和学术界设定并实现个人目标，成功率达到90％。 他曾在肯塔基大学（美国）为具有不同篮球技能水平的儿童和青少年提供教练7年以上， 国际俱乐部（中国北京），Youcan Youth，NIKE篮球夏令营在（湖南，长沙，深圳，云南，山东，杭州）， CHENGSI-CULTURE（上海），上海黑风公司，YK PAO SCHOOL，菊园小学，一中心小学，育才初级中学和LIQIUPING公司（上海）

trans-unit.source: A 10-week term class for those aged between 5 to 19 years old. The duration for each class is 1.5 hours. Training includes individual instruction and repetitions, and small group drills – game situations, half court drills, and game scrimmage with running clock and score to simulate a high paced actual game environment. The depth of the instruction increases gradually in appropriate increments based on age and ability.
trans-unit.target: 为期10周的短期类的5岁至19岁之间。用于每个类别的持续时间为1.5小时。培训内容包括个别指导和重复，和小团体训练 - 比赛的情况下， 半场演练和游戏混战与运行时钟和分数来模拟高节奏的实际游戏环境。该指令的深度根据年龄和能力，适当增加逐渐增加。
上海市静安区新闸路1607号
上海市长宁区芙蓉江路388弄
上海市杨浦区彰武路100号
上海市静安区康定路770号
上海市静安区康定路770号
上海市静安区康定路770号
上海市静安区新闸路1461号
上海市静安区新闸路1461号
上海市静安区新闸路1461号

trans-unit.source: Genius Baller private basketball skills coaching and basketball training for individuals is ideal for serious athletes that want to identify and hone in on specific areas which need improvement.
trans-unit.target: Genius Baller私人篮球技能教练和个人篮球培训非常适合想要识别并磨练需要改进的特定领域的严肃运动员。

trans-unit.source: 1 – 1 training is a personalized and dedicated time to work on closing skills-gap or working intensively to develop a specific skill set whether it be :
trans-unit.target: 1-1培训是个性化的，专门的时间，用于缩小技能差距或集中精力发展特定技能，无论是：

trans-unit.source: Private basketball coaching lessons will be a focus on ball handling, shooting form, balance, accuracy, footwork post or perimeter scoring moves, and defensive principles.
trans-unit.target: 私人篮球教练课程将是重点 控球, 射击形式, 平衡, 准确性, 步法 哨所或外围得分手以及防守原则。

trans-unit.source: Personal basketball coaching can also help boost overall hoops IQ, confidence, and aggressiveness. Small group sessions expand to team-concepts.
trans-unit.target: 个人篮球教练还可以帮助提高篮球的整体智商，信心和积极性。小组会议扩展为团队概念。

trans-unit.source:
Become a complete player and tell the coach what you need to work on.
The individual can also learn how to do a proper layup. Some parents want block sessions similar to a crash course just to make the school team.
trans-unit.target: 成为一名完整的球员，并告诉教练您需要做什么 个人还可以学习如何进行适当的上篮。一些家长希望像速成班这样的分组会议只是为了组建学校团队。

trans-unit.source: Each session is 1hour and 15mins, for Kids and Adults, register now:
trans-unit.target: 每次课程为1小时15分钟，儿童和成人请立即注册

trans-unit.source:
Beginner Basketball@Genius Baller
New to basketball or you have started playing and wish to be better? Beginner’s basketball is a perfect introductory program to game of basketball in a safe environment. Participants will learn all the fundamentals of basketball in a small group. Young basketball enthusiast will develop dribbling techniques and become an all-round skills basketball player. They will build on fundamentals and fitness over a course of time.
trans-unit.target:
初学者篮球@Genius Baller
初学者的篮球是在安全环境下进行篮球比赛的完美入门课程。 参与者将在一个小组中学习篮球的所有基础知识。 年轻的篮球爱好者将发展运球技术，并成为全方位的篮球运动员。 它们将在一段时间内建立在基本原则和适应性之上。

trans-unit.source: Basketball training is open to students with special needs. Contact us
trans-unit.target: 篮球训练对有特殊需要的学生开放。 联系我们

trans-unit.source: If your child has an interest in basketball or wants to learn, this camp is the ultimate experience.
trans-unit.target: 如果您的孩子对篮球感兴趣或想学习，那么这个营地是您的终极体验。

trans-unit.source: An intensive week of training and workshops, the camp will help your child to excel on the court – learning the fundamentals, developing their skills and achieving a thorough understanding of the rules and theory. Genius Baller Basketball camps also help to develop essential life skills including teamwork, sharing, self-confidence, competitiveness and celebrating own and others’ achievements. contact us
trans-unit.target: 训练营为期一周的密集训练，将帮助您的孩子在法庭上脱颖而出–学习基本知识， 培养他们的技能并全面了解规则和理论。 Genius Baller篮球训练营还有助于发展基本的生活技能，包括团队合作，分享， 自信，竞争力以及庆祝自己和他人的成就。 contact us

trans-unit.source:
Please contact us for more information
Shanghai,China Tel:+8613248022245 Email:genius.baller@hotmail.com
trans-unit.target:
请与我们联系获取更多信息
上海，中国 电话号码:+8613248022245 电子邮件:genius.baller@hotmail.com
